subject: memory: samsung: exynos5422-dmc: Fix refcount leak in of_get_dram_timings
notes: Reused calibration-verified seed-slice + poc-for-verifier from lin-4-rep2 (verifier passes strict).
Full POC.c has both _buggy and _fixed (per R1). poc-for-verifier.c contains only _buggy for whole-file count alignment with seed-slice.

Iter1 query fired on _fixed (early `if(!np_ddr) return -EINVAL` reachable-without-release). Iter2 added nonNullStartBB filter — starts CFG search from the successor of the null-check guard, eliminating the failed-acquire path.
Final query fires only inside of_get_dram_timings_buggy (POC.c lines 48/53/58 returns reachable without of_node_put). Silent on _fixed.
